description:
Track and manage your mountain bike suspension settings and their change history
Suspension Setup helps mountain bike riders keep track of their suspension settings and monitor changes over time.

Features:
* Manage multiple suspension setups
* Track fork settings: air pressure, sag, volume spacers, low-speed compression (LSC), high-speed compression (HSC), low-speed rebound (LSR), high-speed rebound (HSR)
* Track shock settings with the same parameters
* Track front and rear tyre pressures
* Enable or disable individual fields per setup to match your specific components
* Full change history: every time you save updated settings, the changes are logged with a timestamp
* Add or edit comments on history entries to note what prompted each change
* Undo history entries to revert your suspension back to a previous state
* Record serial numbers and product pages for your fork and shock
* No cloud, no account required, no data sent anywhere — everything stays on your device
